body:
Dear Friend,

Last night at the Fox
News #GOPdebate, it was clear that one candidate -- Ted Cruz --
has the temperament, the character, and the judgment to be the
next President and Commander in Chief.

As Ted said last
night, this election is about all those left behind during the
last seven years of the Obama economy: the single moms who are
working two or three jobs because their hours have been forcibly
reduced under Obamacare, the truck drivers and the steelworkers
and the mechanics with calluses on their hands who are seeing
their wages stagnate year after year while the cost of living
goes up, and all the young people who are coming out of school
with student debt up to their eyeballs that aren't able to find a
job.

We're asking you to
join us. We building a grassroots movement of Americans from
every walk of life to rise up and ensure the Republican Party
nominates a proven conservative fighter who can defeat Hillary
Clinton and who will bring back jobs, growth, and opportunity for
those who are hurting the most.

Best,

Alice Stewart
Communications
Director

Peter, the media and pundits are saying that I won the GOP Debate but, for me, the debate wasn't about them, it was about you.

name: Marco Rubio
subject: my voice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46477278:Jk_7tFrGN:m:1:1349778030:903FD9C4E55838D9F8C7C60BCDE4C9A1:r)
---
| | | | Peter, I hope you watched the debate last night, because if you did, you saw me lay out why we need a nominee with a vision for America's future -- who actually has solutions to the tough problems America faces, and isn't afraid to offer them. Donald Trump can't be our nominee because whenever he gets asked for a policy position or idea, he can't offer anything but personal attacks in response. **But you might have noticed I sounded a little hoarse making that case. In fact, I 've been told that if I don't rest, I'm going to lose my voice.** **Here 's the thing: I won't rest.** I'm not going to rest until Donald Trump is defeated and we have a nominee who can offer real ideas for Americans and who can beat Hillary Clinton. So who knows what I'm going to sound like in a week or two. [**Will you be my voice?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46477278:Jk_7tFrGN:m:1:1349778030:903FD9C4E55838D9F8C7C60BCDE4C9A1:r) I'm going to be all over the country on the campaign trail this weekend, but [**I need your help.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46477278:Jk_7tFrGN:m:1:1349778030:903FD9C4E55838D9F8C7C60BCDE4C9A1:r) I can't stop Donald Trump alone. It's about what we're saying, not how we say it. We have the ideas and the vision to restore the American Dream and help working Americans -- but we need to get the message out, and that's expensive. [**We 're trying to raise $300,000 in the next 24 hours.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46477278:Jk_7tFrGN:m:1:1349778030:903FD9C4E55838D9F8C7C60BCDE4C9A1:r) Let's join our voices together -- [**chip in to say you don 't want Trump as your nominee, and you do want someone with a vision for America to lead and prosper in the 21st Century.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46477278:Jk_7tFrGN:m:1:1349778030:903FD9C4E55838D9F8C7C60BCDE4C9A1:r) Thanks,
Marco

Marco Rubio

Peter, I wanted to make sure that you saw Gov. Kasich's email. That's what I call a debate win!!

-Kevin

P.S. Have you seen our newest web video? [Watch it (here) and consider chipping in to fund our critical grassroots programs](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33962926:WO9_awCeN:m:1:958431888:F8B43F418DDD96256569E3B8C29C8675:r). Thx

_Sent from my iPad_

\--

From: John Kasich
To: Kevin Bingle

Date: Friday, March 4th

Kevin, the media and pundits are saying that I won the GOP Debate but, for me, the debate wasn't about them, it was about you.

While the other candidates were stuck in the mud, **I tried to offer a positive vision about our great ability to solve our challenges with real solutions** if we'd just stop attacking each other and start working together.

**[If you agree, I need your support right now to support our critical grassroots programs](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33962926:WO9_awCeN:m:1:958431888:F8B43F418DDD96256569E3B8C29C8675:r)**.

**Our positive message is winning and I am going to defeat Donald Trump in Ohio - I guarantee you.**

[>>Chip in $25<<](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33962928:WO9_awCeN:m:1:958431888:F8B43F418DDD96256569E3B8C29C8675:r)

[>>Chip in $50<<](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33962929:WO9_awCeN:m:1:958431888:F8B43F418DDD96256569E3B8C29C8675:r)

[>>Chip in $100<<](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33962930:WO9_awCeN:m:1:958431888:F8B43F418DDD96256569E3B8C29C8675:r)

No Republican has EVER won the White House without winning in Ohio. Not only will I defeat Trump there, but polls show that I am the best Republican candidate to defeat Hillary this fall.

**Kevin , I need your support. Michigan votes on the 8th and Ohioans vote on the 15th**.

[Please consider chipping in $25 or more right now to help us win!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33962926:WO9_awCeN:m:1:958431888:F8B43F418DDD96256569E3B8C29C8675:r)

Thank you for your support.

-John

subject: Vote for your favorite video!
body:

Just this week, the Akron Beacon Journal and Cleveland Plain Dealer endorsed his primary opponent. While Ted attempts to hide from the past, Rob Portman is laying out his vision for a future with a stronger economy and better jobs for Ohio workers.

Last month, we released a new wed ad detailing Ted Strickland's dangerous foreign policy agenda, and now we're asking for your help. Ohio voters simply can't afford to go back to Ted Strickland's Ohio. We'd like you to pick which ad best shows why Ohio can’t go back to Retread Ted!

body:
#
_"The great challenge that we face is whether the United States will become a vibrant democracy with a strong middle class or whether we slide into an oligarchy in which the economic and political life of the country is controlled by a handful of billionaire families."_ \- Bernie Sanders
Sisters and brothers, we are extraordinarily proud of the way we've funded this campaign: more than 4.8 million individual contributions from working people giving small amounts of money. But we have 12 important primaries and caucuses in the next two weeks, and we've set an important goal that I have to ask you to help us meet:
[**Contribute $2.70 and help us reach 5 million individual contributions by Sunday night 's important debate in Michigan. If we get there, Bernie will tell the national audience from the debate stage.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/five-million?refcode=em160304v1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/five-million?refcode=em160304v1-full")
In this country we have a political system in which a handful of very wealthy people use their obscene wealth to buy politicians and elections.
Many politicians in both parties are happy to take grotesque sums of money from billionaires who bankrupted the economy and who profit from the destruction of our environment, the outsourcing of jobs, and the high price of drugs that are killing Americans.
Not Bernie. He doesn't go around asking millionaires and billionaires for money. Our campaign doesn't have a super PAC. This campaign is powered by millions of people coming together to transform a nation.
**Help us reach 5 million individual contributions bySunday night's debate. You can do that here:**
[**https://go.berniesanders.com/5-million**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/five-million?refcode=em160304v1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/five-million?refcode=em160304v1-full")
Bernie doesn't represent large corporations and he doesn't want their money. Throughout American history, nothing significant happens in terms of social change unless a strong grassroots movement takes place. That's what we're building through our political revolution.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/five-million?refcode=em160304v1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/five-million?refcode=em160304v1-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Sheila O'Connell, Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: shocked
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

We know one thing is certain -- the Koch Brothers and big money special interests don't want Chris in the U.S. Senate.

Dark money operators understand that Chris won't stop until he ends their efforts to buy our elections. That's why they are going after him. They don't want him to shine the light of transparency on secret dark money expenditures.

The Koch Brothers are not the only ones targeting Chris. Unfortunately, a national SuperPac supporting our opponent has already spent $1 million in outside money to buy this election - and it's having an effect. Today we're officially just two months out and we need your help to make sure this election can't be bought by big money interests.

Marylanders deserve an effective leader on their side who will fight for them until the job is done. You can help make this happen. Donate $25 today and help ensure Big Money Interests don't win on Primary Day! (https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feb-eom-cvh?refcode=em22616&amount=25.00&recurring=12)

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Chip in $10 right now>>> (https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feb-eom-cvh?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em22616)

Chip in $35 right now>>> (https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feb-eom-cvh?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=em22616)

Chip in $100 right now>>> (https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feb-eom-cvh?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em22616)

Chip in $250 right now>>> (https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feb-eom-cvh?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em22616)

Or, donate another amount (https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feb-eom-cvh?refcode=em22616)
There are just two months to go before voters decide who the Democratic nominee will be for Senator. You and I know that Chris is the right leader for the job, but with big money special interests targeting Chris we need your help if we're going to succeed.

This Senate campaign will come down to a fundamental question -- are we going to let special interests speak for Maryland voters, or are we going to stand with Chris Van Hollen? Please donate $25 or whatever you can right now to help ensure that we send Chris to the U.S. Senate. (https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feb-eom-cvh?refcode=em22616&amount=25.00&recurring=12)

Yvette Lewis
Campaign Co-Chair
Van Hollen for SenatePaid for by Van Hollen for US Senate

subject: first debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,

Quick note - Eric Greitens will participate in the first televised gubernatorial debate on Thursday, March 17th at 7:00pm. The debate is being held in Columbia at the Missouri Theatre and will be broadcast live on KOMU-TV. All Republican candidates for governor will be present.

There will be an audience for the debate. If you are interested in attending the debate with our team to support Eric, please respond back to my email to reserve your tickets or call our office at 314-899-0288. Please include the names of everyone who will be attending, and your contact information so we can follow-up with ticket information.

Please let me know if you have any questions.

On to Victory,

AC

Austin Chambers

Campaign Manager

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

4579 Laclede Avenue #138 — St. Louis, Missouri 63108
